channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: He was having a mental health crisis. Memphis task force agents arrived and shot him
item.description: Jonah Neal, 25, was struck by a Homeland Security Investigations agent in May. At least four deadly shootings linked to the task force have occurred...

item.title: Eat ice cream for a long, healthy life? This doctor says yes
item.description: Dr. Zeke Emanuel, a prominent U.S. health policy physician, challenges the wellness industry with a back-to-basics approach to optimizing health.

item.title: Pythons' extreme biology may offer insights for treating human diseases
item.description: These snakes can survive months without food, alter their heart size, and rapidly adjust their metabolism.

item.title: How federal prison guards prevent lawsuits from being filed
item.description: Prisoners can report mistreatment, but doing so often leads to retaliation, according to an NPR investigation.
